personal.preferred_title: Data Engineer | Python, SQL, API & Platform Data Pipelines

summary: Data Engineer with extensive software and data-platform experience building reliable Python/SQL pipelines and analytics-ready datasets in enterprise environments. Strong hands-on development skills across REST-based integrations, modular Python packaging, and production data workflows with a pragmatic platform-support mindset. Experienced working under tight timelines while maintaining quality, collaboration, and operational reliability.

experience.title: Senior Capacity & Data Engineer
bullets: Built and maintained production data pipelines in Python, Pandas, and SQL ingesting telemetry from 6,000+ endpoints.
Developed reusable Python modules and automation scripts to streamline ETL processing, data validation, and reporting workflows.
Designed and optimized data models and queries to support efficient analytics and operational decision-making.
Collaborated across engineering and platform teams to troubleshoot issues, support operations, and improve data pipeline reliability.

experience.title: Performance Engineer
bullets: Integrated and analyzed multi-source telemetry data to identify bottlenecks and improve performance outcomes.
Supported cloud migration and platform modernization efforts in a fast-paced delivery environment.

experience.title: Senior Consultant (APM SME)
bullets: Created extraction scripts and operational data artifacts for enterprise engineering teams.
Worked directly with stakeholders to support platform operations and resolve production issues efficiently.

experience.title: Senior Systems & Data Migration Engineer
bullets: Led large-scale data migration work with emphasis on performance, integrity, and maintainable architecture.
Built testing and validation workflows to ensure stable deployment in production-like environments.

experience.title: Performance Test Engineer
bullets: Performed data-driven diagnostics and authored technical analysis to support high-quality engineering outcomes.

education.degree: High Diploma / Post-Graduate Diploma in Computer Engineering Technology / Computer Science
Bachelor of Science in Civil Engineering

projects.name: Python-Based ETL Automation Framework
projects.description: Built modular Python ETL components and validation workflows to improve reliability and reduce manual processing effort.

projects.name: Enterprise Data Pipeline Optimization
projects.description: Improved pipeline throughput, quality checks, and query efficiency for large-scale analytics and reporting use cases.
